overview: This fish appears to be a spotted long-whiskered catfish, possibly a Vulture Catfish (Calophysus macropterus) or similar species. It has distinct dark spots over a silvery body and long barbels typical of the Pimelodidae family. The specimen measures approximately 10 centimeters in total length based on the included ruler.
